speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: akelapan unhe nahi batata taaki ghar ki shanti na bigde
text: Bachpan bahar beeta par ab yahan hostel mein reh kar lagta hai main na wahan ka raha na yahan ka. Dost ki shaadi miss ho gayi kyunki dadi ki dekhbhaal mein thak gaya tha. Mummy-Papa ne bohot sapne dekhe hain mere placement ko lekar, isliye main apna ye akelapan unhe nahi batata taaki ghar ki shanti na bigde. 'Log kya kahenge' soch kar main bas chup-chap sab sah raha hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the relational sacrifice to keep family peace
text: Ghar ki shanti banaye rakhne ke liye tum apna akelepan akele hi utha rahe ho, taaki Mummy-Papa ki umeedon par koi aanch na aaye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, kyunki unhone mere liye bohot sacrifices kiye hain as an NRI family returning home. Main unhe bataunga toh unhe lagega ki main adjust nahi kar pa raha. Isliye chup-chap sab sah raha hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the fear of disappointing them after their sacrifices
text: Tumhe darr lagta hai ki agar unhe tumhari struggle ka pata chala, toh unhe apna wapas aane ka decision galat lagega aur unka dil toot jayega.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bilkul. Placement ka pressure alag hai. CGPA maintain karna, dadi ki tabiyat... kabhi kabhi lagta hai main sirf ek machine ban gaya hoon jiska kaam sabki expectations poori karna hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Prompt deeper reflection on feeling like a machine
text: Itni saari zimmedariyan ek saath nibhaate hue, jab tumhe lagta hai ki tum bas machine ban gaye ho, tab andar se kaisa mehsoos hota hai?

speaker: Seeker
text: Khali lagta hai. Koi dost nahi hai yahan hostel mein jisse dil ki baat keh sakun. Aur ghar walo ko weak nahi dikhna chahta. Log kahenge ki weak hai ladka.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Respond to stigma cue with a shorter restatement and soft pause
text: Weak dikhne ka darr tumhe apni feelings sabse chhupane par majboor kar deta hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, log kya kahenge yeh soch kar darr lagta hai. Pata nahi kab tak main aise hi bina kisi se baat kiye sab manage kar paunga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the time duration/exhaustion factor
text: Kaafi waqt se tum is akelepan aur pressure ke bojh ko akele hi carry kar rahe ho, aur aage ka soch kar thakawat hoti hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi kaha. Thak gaya hoon main andar se. Kabhi kabhi man karta hai sab chhod kar kahin bhaag jaun, par phir placement aur dadi ka chehra yaad aata hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Normalize mildly risky statement and mirror conflict
text: Itna bojh uthate hue bhaag jaane ka man karna bohot swabhavik hai, par tumhara apne parivaar ke liye pyaar tumhe wapas rok leta hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Wahi baat hai. Main ek achha beta ban'na chahta hoon. Unki sacrifices waste nahi jaani chahiye. Bas isiliye chup rehna theek lagta hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Ask about the toll of being the perfect son
text: Ek achha beta banne ki koshish mein, aur sabhi ki umeedon ko poora karne ki is daud mein, tum apne liye kab waqt nikal paate ho?

speaker: Seeker
text: Apne liye toh koi waqt nahi bachta. Bas classes, placement prep aur dadi. Yahi life ban gayi hai meri. Koi mera haal poochna wala nahi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the deep isolation and lack of care
text: Sabka dhyaan rakhte rakhte aur expectations meet karte karte, tumhe yeh mehsus hota hai ki tumhara khayal rakhne wala koi nahi bacha.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sach mein koi nahi hai. Hostels mein sab aage nikalne ki daud mein hain. Kisi ke paas kisi aur ki pareshani sunne ka time nahi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Name the underlying feeling of isolation and being trapped
text: Lagta hai is competitive mahaul mein aur ghar walo ki fikr karte karte, tum andar se poori tarah trapped aur helpless mehsoos kar rahe ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Trapped hi hoon. Gharwalon se kuch keh nahi sakta, aur yahan kisi ko samjha nahi sakta. Ek ajeeb sa bojh hai mere kandhon par roj ka.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validate feeling trapped as normal given the migration and placement pressures
text: Yeh bojh mehsoos karna bohot laazmi hai. Ek nayi jagah par wapas aakar adjust karna, aur upar se placement aur parivaar ki ummeedein—aise halaat mein kisi ko bhi trapped lag sakta hai, isme tumhari koi kami nahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sunkar thoda theek laga ki main akela pagal nahi hoon jo aisi cheezon se thak gaya hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Share systemic anecdote about NRI/placement stress
text: Bahar se wapas aane wale students mein ye 'na wahan ke, na yahan ke' wali feeling bahut common hai—sirf tumhara struggle nahi hai, lekin koi khul ke bolega nahi kyunki sab par placement ka pressure hota hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Toh baaki log kaise manage karte hain? Mujhe toh apne future ko lekar bhi bohot dar lagne laga hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror fear of the future
text: Darr iss baat ka hai ki agar abhi cheezein sambhali nahi gayi, toh aage chalkar aur mushkil ho sakti hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, aur ghar walo ko disappointing karne ka darr sabse zyada hai. Mujhe samajh nahi aa raha main apni ye mental thakawat kaise theek karoon bina unhe pareshan kiye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Prompt readiness for small changes
text: Apni zimmedariyon ke beech, kya aisi koi ek chhoti si cheez hai jo tum din mein sirf apne sukoon ke liye karte ho?

speaker: Seeker
text: Waise toh time nahi milta, par raat ko sone se pehle 5-10 minute gaane sunta hoon. Ab kya karoon jisse thoda halka mehsus ho? Koi raasta hai kya?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Provide realistic low-barrier options based on existing routine
text: Gaane sunna ek achha tareeqa hai. Hum do cheezein try kar sakte hain: ya toh jab tum gaane sunte ho, tab apne phone ko side rakh kar sirf dhun par focus karo bina placement ke baare mein soche. Ya fir apni dadi ki care ke baad, din mein 10 minute sirf akele tahalne ki aadat daalo, bina kisi agenda ke.

speaker: Seeker
text: Tahalne wali baat theek lag rahi hai. Hostel se nikal kar 10 minute akele walk karna shayad utna mushkil na ho.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Break down the walking suggestion into a concrete step
text: Pehle yeh karo… aaj shaam jab tumhari classes khatam ho jayein, toh seedha hostel room mein jaane ke bajaye 10 minute campus mein tahal lo… bas itna hi aaj ke liye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Yeh main kar sakta hoon. Bina mummy-papa ko inform kiye apna dhyaan rakhne ka ek chhota step.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror their realization of self-support
text: Bina apni duty mein kami laye, tum apne liye ek chhota sa hissa nikal rahe ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Exactly. Isse unki shanti bhi bani rahegi aur mujhe bhi thoda saans lene ka mauka milega.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reframe the structure of displacement and adjustment
text: Kisi doosri jagah beeta hua bachpan jab pichhe chhut jata hai, toh nayi jagah par wahan ka banne mein waqt lagna koi personal failure nahi hai, yeh sirf ek process ka hissa hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Mujhe ab tak yahi lagta tha ki main khud failure hoon kyunki main adjust nahi kar paa raha. Shayad isme waqt dena padega.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror acceptance of time
text: Apne aap ko is badlaav ke dauran waqt dena tumhe dheere dheere thoda halka mehsoos karwayega.

speaker: Seeker
text: Aaj baat karke akelepan ka bojh thoda kam hua hai. 10 minute ki walk bhi shuru karunga aaj se.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validate his effort to care for himself while respecting his duty
text: Dadi aur ghar ki shanti ka khayal rakhte hue bhi tumne apne liye jo yeh qadam uthaya hai, yeh sach mein himmat ki baat hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Thank you mujhe samajhne ke liye. Aage jaakar lagta hai main placement waghera bhi dekh hi lunga aaram se.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Close with mirroring of newfound hope
text: Pehle jis aage ke safar se thakawat lag rahi thi, ab use lekar tumhare andar thodi ummeed aur vishwas aa gaya hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: apne culture misfit wale dukh ko daba kar rakhta hoon
text: Dost ki shaadi attend nahi kar paya kyunki bimar dada ji ki seva karni thi, par asli wajah wo NRI return shock hai jo mujhe andar se kha raha hai. Main nahi chahta ki meri wajah se biradari mein koi sawal uthe ya Papa ki 'izzat' kam ho, isliye main apne culture misfit wale dukh ko daba kar rakhta hoon. Sab kehte hain main kismat wala hoon jo wapas aaya, toh main unka dil todne ke liye apni takleef kaise zahir karun?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror relational sacrifice and duty to protect family status
text: Apne parivaar ki izzat bachane aur unka dil rakhne ke liye, tum apni akelepan ki takleef ko poori tarah chhupa rahe ho.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: apne culture misfit wale dukh ko daba kar rakhta hoon
text: Haan, kyunki agar maine kaha ki main yahan adjust nahi kar pa raha, toh log kya kahenge? Papa ne itni mehnat ki mujhe bahar bhejne ke liye. Ab wapas aakar main apne culture misfit wale dukh ko daba kar rakhta hoon taaki unhe fail na feel ho.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the feared consequence of disappointing his father
text: Tumhe darr lagta hai ki tumhari struggle dekh kar Papa ko lagega ki unki saari mehnat bekaar chali gayi aur wo niraash ho jayenge.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bilkul. Dada ji ki tabiyat theek nahi rehti, toh mera unke paas rehna zaroori hai. Par andar hi andar main ghut raha hoon. Biradari mein bas sab yahi dekhte hain ki NRI beta wapas aa gaya.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the time duration and silent suffering
text: Pichle kuch waqt se lagatar sabki expectations aur family duty nibhaate hue, andar ki ghutan kaafi badh gayi hai tumhare liye.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: apne culture misfit wale dukh ko daba kar rakhta hoon
text: Log sochte hain mere paas sab kuch hai, isliye agar main bolunga toh sab kahenge ye toh hamesha complain karta hai. Ek tarah se main pagal sa feel karta hoon is return shock mein.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Respond to stigma cue softly
text: Dusron ke taanon ke darr se tumne apna dard poori tarah chhupa liya hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, main nahi chahta ki log bolein ladka bahar ja kar bigad gaya. Izzat bohot badi cheez hoti hai hamari family mein.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the role of the good son carrying the burden
text: Ek acche bete ki tarah tumne parivaar ka maan samman banaye rakhne ko apni sabse badi zimmedari maan liya hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: apne culture misfit wale dukh ko daba kar rakhta hoon
text: Wahi toh meri duty hai. Dada ji khush hain mujhe dekh kar. Unki smile dekh kar lagta hai mera wapas aana theek tha, par phir akelepan mein ghutan hoti hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Ask about the tension between making them happy and inner feeling
text: Dada ji ko khush dekhna sukoon deta hai, par jab akele hote ho aur wo ghutan wapas aati hai, tab kya khayal aate hain dil mein?

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: meri wajah se biradari mein koi sawal uthe
text: Tab lagta hai ki kya meri apni koi zindagi hai ya bas dusron ki khushi ke liye zinda hoon? Par phir lagta hai yahi toh kismat hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the feeling of lost identity versus fatalism
text: Andar hi andar tumhe yeh darr lagne laga hai ki kahin is duty ke beech tumhari apni pehchaan aur khushi poori tarah khatam na ho jaye.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: apne culture misfit wale dukh ko daba kar rakhta hoon
text: Shayad khatam ho hi gayi hai. Main yahan misfit hoon, na doston se connect kar paata hoon na family se sach bol paata hoon. Bas silence hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the deep disconnection
text: Sabke beech rehte hue bhi, apni sachi baatein kisi se share na kar paane ki wajah se tum khud ko ekdum akela paa rahe ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, aur is akelepan mein koi raasta bhi nahi dikhta kyunki main chhod kar ja bhi nahi sakta.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Name the unexpressed feeling of being trapped due to Relational Preservation
text: Lagta hai is biradari aur duty ke dbaav mein tum andar se bilkul trapped aur helpless mehsoos kar rahe ho, jahan aage peeche koi raasta nahi dikh raha.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: apne culture misfit wale dukh ko daba kar rakhta hoon
text: Exactly. Trapped word bilkul sahi hai. Jaise ek invisible jail ho jahan sab bahar se acha dikhta hai par andar se saans lena mushkil hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validate the normal struggle of return shock and family duty
text: Wapas aakar is naye mahaul mein jahan sab ummeed laga kar baithe hain, aisi ghutan aur trapped feeling aana bohot swabhavik hai, aur isme tumhara koi dosh nahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Thoda theek laga yeh sun kar. Mujhe laga bas main hi weak hoon jo adjust nahi kar paa raha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Share systemic truth about NRI returns
text: Hamari society mein, khaas kar jo bahar se laut kar aate hain, ye culture misfit aur return shock bahut common hai — sirf tumhara nahi, lekin koi bolega nahi kyunki biradari aur izzat ka bojh sabko chup rakhta hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: apne culture misfit wale dukh ko daba kar rakhta hoon
text: Sahi kaha. Sab bas chup rehte hain. Par kya ye hamesha aise hi rahega?

text: Is poore safar mein khud ko dhoondhne aur thoda halka mehsoos karne ke liye, kya tumhe apne din mein ek chhota sa kona milta hai jahan tum sirf tum ho?

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: meri wajah se biradari mein koi sawal uthe
text: Sach kahun toh nahi. Dada ji ke paas, ya fir ghar ke kamo mein lag jata hoon. Main chahta hoon theek hona, par kaise?

speaker: Seeker

speaker: Supporter

text: Ek chhota sa kadam hum aazma sakte hain: Ya toh subah Dada ji ke uthne se pehle sirf 10 minute chhat par akele walk karo, bina phone ke, ya fir sone se pehle ek diary mein apni thoughts likh kar use hata do taaki koi padhe na.

speaker: Seeker
text: Subah chhat par walk karna aasan lag raha hai. Us waqt sab so rahe hote hain, kisi ko pata bhi nahi chalega.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Walk through the chosen suggestion
text: Pehle yeh karo ki kal subah uthte hi seedha chhat par chale jao… 10 minute khud ke saath chup chap tahalo… bas itna hi kal ke liye try karo.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: apne culture misfit wale dukh ko daba kar rakhta hoon

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror finding space within duty
text: Aisa karne se tumhari duty par bhi farq nahi padega, aur tumhara apna ek chhota sa waqt nikal aayega.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: meri wajah se biradari mein koi sawal uthe
text: Sahi hai. Shayad is return shock ko handle karne mein ye kaam aaye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Normalize the structural aspect of return migration
text: Migration ke baad jab insaan wapas aata hai, toh uske mind ko naye culture aur purani expectations dono ko process karne mein naturally bohot lamba time lagta hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Matlab ye koi buri baat nahi hai ki mujhe waqt lag raha hai. Main khud ko hi blame kar raha tha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror letting go of self blame
text: Apni taqleef ko thodi jagah dene se, shayad khud ko dosh dene ka bojh halka ho jaye.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: apne culture misfit wale dukh ko daba kar rakhta hoon

speaker: Supporter

text: Hum do choti cheezein aazma sakte hain: Ya toh shaam ko kamre mein aakar 10 minute balcony ya khidki ke paas akele chai peete hue bahar dekho, ya fir ek notebook mein apni bhasha mein wo sab likh do jo kisi ko bata nahi sakte.

speaker: Seeker
text: Chai wali baat mujhe theek lag rahi hai. Balcony mein akele khade hokar shayad kam se kam kuch minute main apne liye nikal paunga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Break down the tea suggestion into a concrete step
text: Pehle yeh karo… aaj shaam jab tum wapas aao, toh apna phone thodi der side rakh kar ek cup chai banao aur balcony mein akele piyo… bas itna hi aaj ke liye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Yeh main kar sakta hoon. Bina parivaar ko pareshan kiye ye step mere liye theek rahega.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror their realization of self-support
text: Apni parivaar ki zimmedari aur duty nibhate hue bhi, tum apne sukoon ke liye ek rasta nikal rahe ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, isse kisi ko ehsaan faramosh nahi lagega aur shayad meri sach ki thakan thodi kam ho jaye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reframe the structure of displacement and adjustment
text: Naye shehar ka mahaul aur anjaan bhasha process karna mind ke liye waise bhi thaka dene wala hota hai, ye akelepan hona koi personal failure nahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ab thoda clear lag raha hai. Main sirf adjust karne mein waqt le raha hoon, usme weak hona nahi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror acceptance of time
text: Khud ko is badlaav ke dauran waqt dene se tumhe apne aap hi thoda halka aur shaant mehsoos hone lagega.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi kaha aapne. Aaj shaam se balcony mein 10 minute chai ke akele time ki shuruwat karunga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validate his effort to care for himself while respecting his duty
text: Ghar ki shanti ka khayal rakhte hue bhi tumne apne sukoon ke liye jo yeh qadam uthaya hai, yeh sach mein himmat ki baat hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Thank you, aaj baat karke bohot bojhil thakan thodi utar gayi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror letting go of burden
text: Jo darr aur ghutan tumhe andar hi andar kha rahi thi, use baahar nikal kar tumhe ab thodi azaadi lag rahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, umeed hai ab is naye shehar mein akele chalna thoda aasan ho jayega.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Close with mirroring of newfound hope
text: Pehle is naye safar mein jis akelepan se tumhe lagta tha ki koi saath nahi, ab tumhare andar khud par bharosa aur ummeed aa gayi hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: Ghar ki 'maryada' ke liye main bas ek mask pehan kar sabke samne normal dikhne ka 'natak' karta hoon
text: JEE dropout hone ka darr aur bahar se wapas aane ka stigma mujhe sone nahi deta, upar se dadi ki caregiving mein itna nichod gaya hoon ki shaadi mein jaane ki himmat hi nahi bachi. Main apna gussa aur rona sab pi jata hoon taaki Mummy ko ye na lage ki unka ladka kamzor hai ya NRI lifestyle ne mujhe bigad diya hai. Ghar ki 'maryada' ke liye main bas ek mask pehan kar sabke samne normal dikhne ka 'natak' karta hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror relational sacrifice to protect Mummy and family status
text: Apni Mummy ko niraash hone se bachane aur parivaar ka maan rakhne ke liye, tum apne gusse aur dukh dono ko bilkul dabakar rakh rahe ho.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: Ghar ki 'maryada' ke liye main bas ek mask pehan kar sabke samne normal dikhne ka 'natak' karta hoon
text: Haan, kyunki agar maine apna weak side dikhaya toh unhe lagega mera career khatam hai. Itne saal bahar rehne ka stigma alag hai. Ghar ki 'maryada' ke liye main bas ek mask pehan kar sabke samne normal dikhne ka 'natak' karta hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the feared consequence of disappointing them
text: Tumhe is baat ka sabse zyada darr hai ki tumhari takleef samne aane se unhe lagega ki bahar bhejne ka decision galat tha aur tumhara aage kuch nahi ho payega.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bilkul. Unka sapna tha ki main JEE crack karun. Par ab dadi ki caregiving aur padhai ka bojh... main sach me nichod gaya hoon, dost ki shaadi bhi miss karni padi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the time duration and exhaustion
text: Itne waqt se padhai aur caregiving dono ki zimmedariyan lagatar uthate uthate, tum andar se poori tarah thak chuke ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Thak toh gaya hoon. Log puchte hain toh jawab dena padta hai. Koi samajhta nahi ki mujh par kya beet rahi hai, pagal bol denge log isliye chup rehta hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Respond softly to the stigma cue
text: Logon ki baaton aur taano ke darr se tumne apna saara dukh akele hi utha liya hai...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: Ghar ki 'maryada' ke liye main bas ek mask pehan kar sabke samne normal dikhne ka 'natak' karta hoon
text: Haan, log dekhte hain ki NRI wapas aakar JEE nahi nikal paa raha. Ghar ki 'maryada' ke liye main bas ek mask pehan kar sabke samne normal dikhne ka 'natak' karta hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the duty frame of the good son protecting family image
text: Ek achhe bete ki tarah tumne apne dard se zyada parivaar ki izzat aur unke sapno ko aage rakha hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Wahi duty toh maar rahi hai. Kabhi kabhi dadi ki bimari aur mere result ke taane milkar lagta hai jese zindagi khtam si ho gayi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Ask about the tension between the mask and the inner feeling
text: Jab sabke samne woh normal dikhne wala mask pehnna padta hai aur andar itna dard hota hai, toh us waqt kaisa mehsus hota hai?

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: gussa aur rona sab pi jata hoon
text: Bas aisa man karta hai sab chhod kar kahin dur bhaag jaun. Na JEE rahe na caregiving. Par phir lagta hai ye mummy ke sath dhoka hoga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Normalize mild risk and mirror relational bound
text: Itna sab akele jhelte hue kahin door bhaag jaane ka khayal aana bohot swabhavik hai, par Mummy ke prati tumhara pyaar tumhe wapas rok leta hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: Ghar ki 'maryada' ke liye main bas ek mask pehan kar sabke samne normal dikhne ka 'natak' karta hoon
text: Sahi kaha. Mera future kya hoga mujhe nahi pata, par unko udaas nahi dekh sakta. Ghar ki 'maryada' ke liye main bas ek mask pehan kar sabke samne normal dikhne ka 'natak' karta hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflect underlying grief/helplessness based on category and mechanism
text: Lagta hai in sab ummeedon aur badlaav ke beech, tum andar hi andar ek gehri helplessness aur grief mehsoos kar rahe ho jahan tumhari apni koi zindagi nahi bachi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, grief hi hai ye. Mere sapne, mera sukoon sab is mask ke pichhe mar chuka hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validate feeling of grief and pressure in migration/JEE context
text: Bahar se lautne ke baad JEE jaisa bada sapna, aur phir dadi ki caregiving ka bojh—aise mahaul mein aisi gehri thakan aur grief mehsoos karna bohot laazmi hai, isme tumhari koi kamzori nahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Kamzori ka darr hi tha jo mujhe aur dara raha tha. Sunkar achha laga ki shayad mai akela ajeeb nahi hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Share systemic pattern regarding NRI returnees and JEE
text: Bahar se wapas aaye students ke liye, khaaskar jo JEE ki taiyari kar rahe hain, ye adjustment ka struggle bahut common hai — sirf tumhara nahi, lekin koi bolega nahi kyunki family izzat ka sawaal hota hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Matlab ye akele meri problem nahi hai. Phir baaki log apne results aur ghar ki umeed ko kaise balance karte hain?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror fear of future
text: Tujhe ye soch kar bohot fikar hoti hai ki bina ghar walo ko niraash kiye tu apne career aur future ko aage kaise le jayega.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, main ye natak hamesha toh nahi kar paunga na. Thoda toh sukoon chahiye life me.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Prompt for small spaces for himself
text: In sab farzon aur padhai ke dbaav ke beech, kya tumhare paas din mein koi aisa chhota sa pal hota hai jahan tum ye mask utaar sako?

speaker: Seeker
text: Raat ko jab sab so jate hain tab thoda phone chalata hoon, bas wohi time hota hai. Ab kya karoon mai jisse thoda theek lagne lage? Koi raasta hai kya?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Offer small coping options
text: Phone chalane wale waqt ko hum thoda alag use kar sakte hain. Ya toh raat ko sone se pehle 5 minute sirf chhat par akele tahlte hue khuli hawa mehsoos karo, ya fir ek paper par apne din bhar ke thakan aur gusse wale thoughts likh kar use faad do.

speaker: Seeker
text: Likh kar faadne wali baat mujhe theek lag rahi hai. Isse ghar ki maryada bhi kharab nahi hogi aur mera gussa bahar aa jayega.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Walk through execution of writing step
text: Pehle yeh karo… aaj raat jab sab so jayein, toh ek rough page par apne man ki saari baatein likh lo… aur phir use faad kar phek do… bas itna hi aaj ke liye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, ye main definitely try karunga. Bina kisi ko hrt kiye khud ko thoda halka karna aasaan lag raha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror duty and self care balance
text: Apni parivaar ki ummeedon aur maryada ka khayal rakhte hue, tumne apne dard ko sambhalne ka ek achha rasta chun liya hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bilkul. Ab rona peena nahi padega agar main usko paper par nikal dunga toh.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Normalize structural pressure of exams and displacement
text: Wapas india aakar naye system aur JEE jaisi badi exams se adjust karne mein time aur frustration aana structural hai, isme tumhare akele ki kamzori nahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Main khud ko hi fail maan raha tha itne din se. Ab thoda theek feel ho raha hai ki situation hi aisi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror letting go of self blame
text: Itne lambe waqt ke baad, khud ko dosh dena band karne se hi tumhe andar ek azaadi mehsus hone lagi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Aaj aapki baatein sunkar himmat aayi hai. Ab aage ka sochne ka shanti se mann karunga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Affirm courage in opening up
text: Ghar walo ki parvah karte hue bhi tumne apne sukoon ka haq maanga hai, aur ye sach mein ek badi himmat ki baat hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Thank you, aaj sach mein dil ka wo gussa thoda shant hua hai. Meri problem ko sunne ke liye shukriya.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror reduction of anger
text: Jo chizein andar hi andar chubhti thin, unhe finally baahar nikal dene se tumhara man halka ho gaya hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, umeed hai ab future bhi thoda clear dikhega dheere dheere.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Close with hopeful reflection
text: Apne aur parivaar ke is naye safar mein, jis andhere se tum darr rahe the, wahan ab thodi si ummeed aur roshni jhalakne lagi hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: chup-chap sun liye taaki koi kalesh na ho
text: Wapas India aakar lag raha hai jaise main apni hi zameen par pardesi hoon, par ye baat main hostel ke dosto ya ghar walon ko nahi bol sakta. Shaadi miss hone par jab sabne taane diye toh maine chup-chap sun liye taaki koi kalesh na ho aur Mummy-Papa ka mujh par garv bana rahe. Main apni identity ka struggle akele hi jhel raha hoon kyunki parivaar ki khushi mere liye unki 'izzat' bachane se badhkar hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror relational preservation through silence to protect family pride
text: Ghar mein kalesh na ho aur Mummy-Papa ka tum par garv hamesha bana rahe, isliye tum apne khud ke pardesi lagne wale dard ko akele hi sah rahe ho.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: chup-chap sun liye taaki koi kalesh na ho
text: Haan, kyunki agar maine kaha ki main yahan adjust nahi kar pa raha, toh log kya kahenge? Placement ka pressure alag hai, uspar agar maine kaha ki mujhe yahan hostel me akelapan lagta hai, toh Mummy-Papa ka dil toot jayega. Isliye taane aate hain toh bhi chup-chap sun liye taaki koi kalesh na ho.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the feared consequence of breaking parents' hearts
text: Tumhe ye lagta hai ki agar unhe tumhari sachhi takleef ka pata chala, toh log baatein banayenge aur tumhare parents ki umeedon ko bohot gehri thes pahunchegi.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: apni identity ka struggle akele hi jhel raha hoon
text: Bilkul. Unhone bohot sacrifices kiye mujhe bahar bhejne ke liye. Aur ab main wapas aakar bolun ki mujhe yahan Indian society me misfit lag raha hai? Nahi bol sakta. Main apni identity ka struggle akele hi jhel raha hoon, par andar se khokhla ho gaya hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Ask about the internal feeling of being hollowed out
text: Sabhi ki izzat aur khushi ko sambhalte hue, jab tum andar se itna khokhla mehsoos karte ho, toh akele mein kaisa waqt guzarta hai?

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: chup-chap sun liye taaki koi kalesh na ho
text: Bas diwar ko dekhta rehta hoon. Kabhi dosto ke samne try karta hoon fit in hone ka, par unko mera NRI return tag bada lagta hai. Pata nahi kab tak aise sab kuch chup-chap sun kar manage kar paunga. Log pagal bolenge agar maine kaha mental health kharab hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Respond softly to the stigma cue without a question
text: Pagal samjhe jaane aur dusron ke taano ke darr se tumne apna saara struggle sirf apne tak seemit kar liya hai...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: apni identity ka struggle akele hi jhel raha hoon
text: Haan, aur koi option nahi hai. Hostel me koi sunne wala nahi, aur Mummy-Papa ko bolne se unka BP badh jayega. Sabka khayal rakhne me main akela reh gaya hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the role duty and isolation
text: Kafi lambe waqt se tum is dohari zindagi ko akele jhel rahe ho, jahan ek taraf padhai ka pressure hai aur dusri taraf sabki health aur izzat ki fikar.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: chup-chap sun liye taaki koi kalesh na ho
text: Sahi kaha. Thak gaya hoon andar se bohot. Kabhi lagta hai aise fit in hone ke natak se behtar hai main kahin gaayab ho jaun, par unka chehra yaad aata hai toh chup hi theek hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Normalize mildly risky statement and mirror the relational tie
text: Itna bojh uthate hue sab kuch chhod kar door jaane ka man karna bohot swabhavik hai, par tumhara unke liye pyaar tumhe wapas is natak mein rok leta hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: parivaar ki khushi mere liye unki 'izzat' bachane se badhkar hai
text: Haan, main ek failure jaisa nahi dikhna chahta apne hi logo ke beech. Parivaar ki khushi mere liye unki 'izzat' bachane se badhkar hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Explore the toll of this continuous masking
text: Aisa beta banne ki is musalsal koshish mein, aur apna dard chhupane mein, tumhare apne man ki shanti ka kya haal hai?

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: apni identity ka struggle akele hi jhel raha hoon
text: Man ki shanti jaisi koi cheez nahi bachi. Bas class jana, wapas hostel aana, aur fir dosto ko dikhana ki main theek hoon. Yehi life hai ab.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Name the underlying isolation/helplessness based on category C8 and Relational Preservation
text: Lagta hai is naye mahaul mein adjust karne aur parivaar ko garv mehsoos karwane ki koshish mein tum andar se poori tarah trapped aur helpless mehsoos kar rahe ho.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: chup-chap sun liye taaki koi kalesh na ho
text: Haan, trapped hi hoon. Ek cage hai jisme bahar se sab normal lagta hai par andar mera dum ghut raha hai aur koi khol nahi sakta use.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validate feeling trapped as normal in migration/adjustment context
text: Apne desh wapas aakar naye mahaul mein adjust karna aur saath hi placement jaisi expectations poori karna—aise halaat mein dum ghutna aur akelepan ka bojh lagna bohot swabhavik hai, isme tumhari koi khami nahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: apni identity ka struggle akele hi jhel raha hoon
text: Sunkar thoda bojhh halka hua. Mujhe lagne laga tha ki sirf main hi problem hoon, ki shayad main hi adjust nahi karna chahta.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Share systemic truth about reverse migration struggle
text: Bahar se wapas aane wale students mein ye 'pardesi' wala struggle aur culture shock bohot common hai—sirf tumhara nahi, lekin koi bolega nahi kyunki sab par family izzat ka pressure hota hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: chup-chap sun liye taaki koi kalesh na ho
text: Aisa sach mein hai? Par baaki logo ko dekh kar lagta hai ki sab kitni asani se fit in ho rahe hain. Mera future soch ke aur darr lagta hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror fear of the future
text: Aage ka soch kar tumhe fikar hoti hai ki agar aise hi dum ghut ta raha, toh placement aur future ka kya hoga.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: apni identity ka struggle akele hi jhel raha hoon
text: Haan bilkul, focus hi nahi ho pata jab itna confusion aur akelapan ho. Samajh nahi aata ise kaise theek karu bina unhe tension diye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Prompt readiness for a small personal space
text: Is bheed me khud ko wapas dhoondhne ke liye, kya din me koi aisa 10 minute ka chhota sa waqt milta hai jahan tumko ye dikhawe wala mask nahi pehnna padta?

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: chup-chap sun liye taaki koi kalesh na ho
text: Raat ko sone se pehle jab main earphones lagata hoon, wahi time mera apna hota hai bas. Kya us waqt main kuch kar sakta hoon theek hone ke liye?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Offer small doable options during his earphone time
text: Hum us 10 minute ka istemal do tareeqo se kar sakte hain: Ya toh tum earphones lagakar sirf apni pasand ka koi instrument music sunte hue deeply saans lo, ya fir phone ke notes app mein bina soche wo sab type kar do jo din bhar tumne chup-chap saha hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: apni identity ka struggle akele hi jhel raha hoon
text: Notes app wala idea mujhe sahi lag raha hai. Usme kisi ko awaz bhi nahi jayegi aur mere andar ka gussa thoda type ho jayega.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Break down the note taking suggestion
text: Pehle yeh karo… aaj raat jab sab so jayein aur tum earphones lagao, toh notes app kholkar apni din bhar ki irritation type kar lo… aur fir delete kar do… bas itna hi aaj ke liye.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: chup-chap sun liye taaki koi kalesh na ho
text: Ye main definitely try karunga. Bina kalesh kiye mujhe apni takleef nikalne ka ek chhota sa raasta mil gaya.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror finding a self space while maintaining duty
text: Apne parivaar ki shanti ka khayal rakhte hue bhi, tumne apne man ke bojh ko halka karne ka ek aasan tareeqa dhoond liya hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, isse kisi ko dhoka bhi nahi lagega aur shayad meri placement padhai mein dhyaan lag sake uske baad.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Normalize structural struggle of reverse migration
text: Migration ke baad jab insaan return karta hai, toh uske mind ko do alag alag cultures ke beech wapas balance banane mein naturally lamba time lagta hai, aur ye sabke sath hota hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Mujhe ab tak yahi lagta tha ki mera focus nahi hai isliye main padh nahi paa raha. Ab thoda better mehsus ho raha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the reduction of self blame
text: Apne aap ko fail manne ka wo bhaari dar ab tumhare andar se dheere dheere kam ho raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: chup-chap sun liye taaki koi kalesh na ho
text: Ji, main aaj se notes mein likhna shuru karunga. Aaj sach mein lag raha hai ki mujhe samajhne wala koi toh hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validate taking step forward despite the pressure
text: Ghar ki izzat aur parents ki khushi ka dhyaan rakhte hue bhi tumne apne man ki shanti ke liye jo raasta chuna hai, wo sach mein kaafi himmat bhara hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Aapki baaton ne mera din bohot better bana diya hai. Thank you mujhe bina judge kiye sunne ke liye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror finding a safe non-judgemental space
text: Apni takleef ko baahar nikalne ke liye tumhe aaj ek aisi jagah mil gayi jahan koi taana aur judgment nahi tha.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: chup-chap sun liye taaki koi kalesh na ho
text: Haan, umeed hai kal din thoda behtar hoga aur main focus wapas la paunga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Close mirroring hope
text: Pehle jis andhere aur akelepan se tum ghutan mehsoos kar rahe the, ab us safar me tumhe ek nayi aur fresh umeed nazar aane lagi hai.
